scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('node_modules/nativewind')) { fs.cpSync('node_modules/nativewind', 'apps/mobile/node_modules/nativewind', { recursive: true }); fs.rmSync('node_modules/nativewind', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('Moved nativewind to apps/mobile node_modules'); }"
